# CoSky

> High-Performance Microservice Governance Platform — Service Discovery & Configuration backed by Redis. Lightweight, zero-extra-infrastructure, 100K+ QPS standard / 70M+ QPS with consistency caching.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](guide/onboarding-contributor.md) — New contributor onboarding: foundations, architecture, and contributing workflow
- [Staff Engineer Guide](guide/onboarding-staff-engineer.md) — Architectural deep-dive for staff/principal engineers
- [Executive Guide](guide/onboarding-executive.md) — Capability map, cost model, and investment thesis for engineering leaders
- [Product Manager Guide](guide/onboarding-pm.md) — Feature map, user journeys, and FAQ for non-engineering stakeholders

## Getting Started

- [Overview](guide/index.md) — CoSky guide index with architecture overview and documentation map
- [Getting Started](guide/getting-started.md) — Quick start guide for Spring Cloud applications
- [Installation](guide/installation.md) — Installation methods: Gradle, Maven, Docker, Kubernetes

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](guide/architecture.md) — Module structure, Redis data model, event-driven design, technology stack
- [Core Module](guide/core.md) — Namespace management, Redis key utilities, PubSub event system

## Configuration

- [Configuration Management](guide/config-service.md) — Config CRUD, versioning, rollback, Lua scripts
- [Consistency Layer](guide/config-consistency.md) — Local caching + PubSub invalidation pattern (256M+ QPS)

## Service Discovery

- [Service Registry](guide/service-registry.md) — Instance registration, heartbeat, deregistration
- [Service Discovery](guide/service-discovery.md) — Service lookup with consistency caching (76M+ QPS)
- [Load Balancers](guide/load-balancers.md) — Random, ArrayWeight, BinaryWeight, TreeWeight implementations
- [Service Topology](guide/service-topology.md) — Consumer-producer dependency tracking and visualization

## Spring Cloud Integration

- [Config Starter](guide/spring-cloud-config.md) — PropertySourceLocator, @RefreshScope auto-refresh
- [Discovery Starter](guide/spring-cloud-discovery.md) — DiscoveryClient, auto-registration, reactive support

## REST API & Dashboard

- [REST API Server](guide/rest-api.md) — HTTP endpoints for all CoSky operations
- [Security & RBAC](guide/security-rbac.md) — JWT auth, namespace-scoped RBAC, audit logging
- [Dashboard](guide/dashboard.md) — React 19 + Ant Design 6 web management interface

## Deployment

- [Docker Deployment](guide/deployment-docker.md) — Docker run and Docker Compose configurations
- [Kubernetes Deployment](guide/deployment-kubernetes.md) — K8s deployment manifests for standalone and cluster Redis
- [Standalone Deployment](guide/deployment-standalone.md) — JAR-based deployment with JVM options

## Performance

- [Benchmarks](guide/performance.md) — JMH benchmark results, comparison with alternatives
